publisher.value: Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC)

name.value: Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC)

description.value: This value set includes all the "Dosages" SNOMED CT codes (i.e. codes with an is-a relationship with 277406006: Dosages).

copyright.value: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
